recommendations.title: Son of Batman
recommendations.overview: Batman learns he has a violent, unruly pre-teen son, secretly raised by the terrorist group known as The League of Assassins.

recommendations.title: LEGO Scooby-Doo! Blowout Beach Bash
recommendations.overview: Mystery, Inc. heads to Blowout Beach for a real swinging beach party when the Ghost Pirates threaten to harsh the good vibes.

recommendations.title: Mortal Kombat Legends: Battle of the Realms
recommendations.overview: The Earthrealm heroes must journey to the Outworld and fight for the survival of their homeland, invaded by the forces of evil warlord Shao Kahn, in the tournament to end all tournaments: the final Mortal Kombat.

recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: The Flash finds himself in a war-torn alternate timeline and teams up with alternate versions of his fellow heroes to restore the timeline.

recommendations.title: Justice League: The New Frontier

recommendations.title: Justice Society: World War II
recommendations.overview: When the Flash finds himself dropped into the middle of World War II, he joins forces with Wonder Woman and her top-secret team known as the Justice Society of America.

recommendations.title: Batman: Assault on Arkham
recommendations.overview: Batman works desperately to find a bomb planted by the Joker while Amanda Waller sends her newly-formed Suicide Squad to break into Arkham Asylum and recover vital information stolen by the Riddler.
